title: ACCESS CONTROL leads (privileged fn, no modifier)
note: external/public + privileged name, NO only* / inline auth

title: REENTRANCY (external call then state write)
note: external call THEN state write, no nonReentrant -> reentrancy (CEI)?

title: UNCHECKED ERC20 return (silent transfer failure)
note: ERC20 transfer/transferFrom return ignored -> use SafeERC20 (USDT/ZRX return false, not revert)

title: OVERFLOW / underflow (pre-0.8 pragma or opt-out math block)
note: unchecked{} opts OUT of 0.8 overflow checks -> verify the arithmetic inside can't wrap

note: unchecked{} opts OUT of 0.8 overflow checks -> verify the arithmetic inside can't wrap

title: OVERFLOW / underflow (pre-0.8 pragma or opt-out math block)
note: unchecked{} opts OUT of 0.8 overflow checks -> verify the arithmetic inside can't wrap

title: SELF-TRANSFER balance inflation (from==to overwrites the debit)
note: custom transfer writes BOTH balances from pre-captured locals with no from==to guard -> self-transfer (from==to) overwrites the debit with the stale to-local -> free balance inflation (LPC/SSS/GPU class). Add a from==to guard or use += for the credit.
